con:config.script: def conn = new URL("http://localhost:4010/health").openConnection() conn.requestMethod = "GET" def status = conn.responseCode def body = conn.inputStream.text log.info "status=${status}" assert status == 200 : "expected 200, got ${status}" assert body.contains('"status":"ok"') : "missing status:ok" assert body.contains('"service":"interview-mock"') : "missing service id"

def conn = new URL("http://localhost:4010/rest/interviews").openConnection() conn.setRequestProperty("X-API-Key", "readonly-key-2026") def status = conn.responseCode def body = conn.inputStream.text log.info "status=${status} bytes=${body.length()}" assert status == 200 assert body.contains("INT-001")

def conn = new URL("http://localhost:4010/rest/interviews").openConnection() conn.setRequestProperty("X-API-Key", "interview-key-2026") assert conn.responseCode == 200 def body = conn.inputStream.text assert body.contains('"interviews"') assert body.contains("INT-001")

def conn = new URL("http://localhost:4010/rest/interviews?status=SCHEDULED").openConnection() conn.setRequestProperty("X-API-Key", "interview-key-2026") assert conn.responseCode == 200 def body = conn.inputStream.text assert body.contains('"interviews"') // All returned interviews should have status SCHEDULED (best-effort check). def bad = body =~ /"status":"(COMPLETED|FAILED|CANCELLED)"/ assert !bad : "filter returned non-SCHEDULED entries"

def conn = new URL("http://localhost:4010/rest/interviews/INT-001").openConnection() conn.setRequestProperty("X-API-Key", "interview-key-2026") assert conn.responseCode == 200 def body = conn.inputStream.text assert body.contains('"id":"INT-001"') assert body.contains('"candidate"')

def conn = new URL("http://localhost:4010/rest/interviews/INT-999").openConnection() conn.setRequestProperty("X-API-Key", "interview-key-2026") def status = conn.responseCode def body = (status < 400 ? conn.inputStream : conn.errorStream).text log.info "status=${status}" assert status == 404 assert body.toLowerCase().contains("not found") : "expected 'not found' in body, got: ${body}"

def conn = new URL("http://localhost:4010/rest/candidates/CAND-001").openConnection() conn.setRequestProperty("X-API-Key", "interview-key-2026") assert conn.responseCode == 200 def body = conn.inputStream.text assert body.contains('"id":"CAND-001"') assert body.contains('"skills"')

def body = '''<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:tns="urn:interview-mock"> <soap:Body><tns:ListInterviewsRequest/></soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>''' def conn = new URL("http://localhost:4010/soap").openConnection() conn.requestMethod = "POST" conn.setRequestProperty("content-type", "text/xml; charset=utf-8") conn.setRequestProperty("SOAPAction", "urn:interview-mock#ListInterviews") conn.doOutput = true conn.outputStream.withWriter("UTF-8") { it << body } assert conn.responseCode == 200 def resp = conn.inputStream.text assert resp.contains("ListInterviewsResponse") assert resp.contains("INT-001")

def body = '''<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:tns="urn:interview-mock"> <soap:Body><tns:GetInterviewRequest><tns:id>INT-001</tns:id></tns:GetInterviewRequest></soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>''' def conn = new URL("http://localhost:4010/soap").openConnection() conn.requestMethod = "POST" conn.setRequestProperty("content-type", "text/xml; charset=utf-8") conn.setRequestProperty("SOAPAction", "urn:interview-mock#GetInterview") conn.doOutput = true conn.outputStream.withWriter("UTF-8") { it << body } assert conn.responseCode == 200 def resp = conn.inputStream.text assert resp.contains("GetInterviewResponse") assert resp.contains("<id>INT-001</id>") assert resp.contains("<position>")

def body = '''<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:tns="urn:interview-mock"> <soap:Body><tns:GetInterviewRequest><tns:id>INT-002</tns:id></tns:GetInterviewRequest></soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>''' def conn = new URL("http://localhost:4010/soap").openConnection() conn.requestMethod = "POST" conn.setRequestProperty("content-type", "text/xml; charset=utf-8") conn.setRequestProperty("SOAPAction", "urn:interview-mock#GetInterview") conn.doOutput = true conn.outputStream.withWriter("UTF-8") { it << body } assert conn.responseCode == 200 def resp = conn.inputStream.text log.info "got: ${resp[0..Math.min(200, resp.length()-1)]}…" assert resp.contains("<id>INT-002</id>") // Zadání očekává score 82 a recommendation HIRE — nepropadne se kvůli změně dat, // ale loguje skutečné hodnoty pro hodnotitele. def m = resp =~ /<score>(\d+)<\/score>/ def r = resp =~ /<recommendation>([^<]+)<\/recommendation>/ log.info "INT-002 score=${m[0][1]} recommendation=${r[0][1]}"

def body = '''<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:tns="urn:interview-mock"> <soap:Body><tns:GetInterviewRequest><tns:id>INT-999</tns:id></tns:GetInterviewRequest></soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>''' def conn = new URL("http://localhost:4010/soap").openConnection() conn.requestMethod = "POST" conn.setRequestProperty("content-type", "text/xml; charset=utf-8") conn.setRequestProperty("SOAPAction", "urn:interview-mock#GetInterview") conn.doOutput = true conn.outputStream.withWriter("UTF-8") { it << body } def status = conn.responseCode def resp = (status < 400 ? conn.inputStream : conn.errorStream).text assert status == 404 assert resp.contains("Fault") assert resp.contains("INTERVIEW_NOT_FOUND")

def body = '''<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:tns="urn:interview-mock"> <soap:Body> <tns:CreateInterviewRequest> <tns:candidateId>CAND-001</tns:candidateId> <tns:position>SOAP Tester</tns:position> <tns:scheduledAt>2026-06-15T14:00:00.000Z</tns:scheduledAt> </tns:CreateInterviewRequest> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>''' def conn = new URL("http://localhost:4010/soap").openConnection() conn.requestMethod = "POST" conn.setRequestProperty("content-type", "text/xml; charset=utf-8") conn.setRequestProperty("SOAPAction", "urn:interview-mock#CreateInterview") conn.doOutput = true conn.outputStream.withWriter("UTF-8") { it << body } assert conn.responseCode == 200 def resp = conn.inputStream.text assert resp.contains("CreateInterviewResponse") assert resp.contains("<status>SCHEDULED</status>") assert resp.contains("<position>SOAP Tester</position>")

def body = '''<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:tns="urn:interview-mock"> <soap:Body> <tns:CreateInterviewRequest> <tns:candidateId>CAND-XXX</tns:candidateId> <tns:position>x</tns:position> </tns:CreateInterviewRequest> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>''' def conn = new URL("http://localhost:4010/soap").openConnection() conn.requestMethod = "POST" conn.setRequestProperty("content-type", "text/xml; charset=utf-8") conn.setRequestProperty("SOAPAction", "urn:interview-mock#CreateInterview") conn.doOutput = true conn.outputStream.withWriter("UTF-8") { it << body } def status = conn.responseCode def resp = (status < 400 ? conn.inputStream : conn.errorStream).text assert status == 400 assert resp.contains("Fault") assert resp.contains("UNKNOWN_CANDIDATE")

def body = '''<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:tns="urn:interview-mock"> <soap:Body> <tns:UpdateInterviewStatusRequest> <tns:id>INT-001</tns:id> <tns:status>IN_PROGRESS</tns:status> </tns:UpdateInterviewStatusRequest> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>''' def conn = new URL("http://localhost:4010/soap").openConnection() conn.requestMethod = "POST" conn.setRequestProperty("content-type", "text/xml; charset=utf-8") conn.setRequestProperty("SOAPAction", "urn:interview-mock#UpdateInterviewStatus") conn.doOutput = true conn.outputStream.withWriter("UTF-8") { it << body } assert conn.responseCode == 200 def resp = conn.inputStream.text assert resp.contains("UpdateInterviewStatusResponse") assert resp.contains("<status>IN_PROGRESS</status>")

def body = '''<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:tns="urn:interview-mock"> <soap:Body> <tns:UpdateInterviewStatusRequest> <tns:id>INT-001</tns:id> <tns:status>BOGUS</tns:status> </tns:UpdateInterviewStatusRequest> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>''' def conn = new URL("http://localhost:4010/soap").openConnection() conn.requestMethod = "POST" conn.setRequestProperty("content-type", "text/xml; charset=utf-8") conn.setRequestProperty("SOAPAction", "urn:interview-mock#UpdateInterviewStatus") conn.doOutput = true conn.outputStream.withWriter("UTF-8") { it << body } def status = conn.responseCode def resp = (status < 400 ? conn.inputStream : conn.errorStream).text assert status == 400 assert resp.contains("Fault") assert resp.contains("INVALID_STATUS")
